title: Uniform Bricks
description: Makes all brick blocks be in the simple shape of stone bricks.
body:
**Uniform Bricks** is a resourcepack that changes all brick blocks in Minecraft to be in the well known shape of stone bricks, to make all brick blocks look more alike.

The blocks affected by **Uniform Bricks** are:
- **Bricks**
- **Nether Bricks** ( Chiseled / Cracked / Red )
- **End Stone Bricks**
- **Mud Bricks**
- **Prismarine Bricks**
- **Purpur Block**
- **Quartz Bricks**

**Note: Uniform Bricks** does not change the texture of some variants of brick blocks (e.g. Chiseled Tuff), as to not change their unique shape. This is done in an extremely careful manner, to ensure that the resourcepack doesn't feel lackluster, but also to not ruin the distinct look of certain blocks.
